ab: Watan ka ralu’ ni yaba’ mu.
Temi ka ralu’ ni yaya’ mu.
kelan cu tutux na asuṟan malikuṟ, Iyung ka ralu’ ni, malapṟow utux ingkaṟalan ni.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Iyung，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Iyung, he is 11 years old.

ab: cel min magaluw lunpuw patas utux papasba’an ci ke’.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: sunkisli’ min mawas kora’ cami ci asuṟan mu malikuṟ.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: sunkisli’ cu lumanguy. mahnguw ci kaca, magaluw min musa’ lumanguy utux min moṟow.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: sunkisli’ cu sunrangi’, anak min magaluw mawas lu lumanguy.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
